title: SoftShade Shader
description: A stylized shaderpack with a soft artistic look, designed for players who care about smooth gameplay as much as visuals. Clean visuals, low performance impact, and comfortable to use for long sessions.
body:
## ✨ SoftShade - Beautiful Shaders for Everyone

A vibrant, colorful Iris shader pack optimized for low-end PCs without sacrificing quality.

**What You Get:**
- Stunning visuals with enhanced colors and dynamic lighting
- Realistic water, shadows, and atmospheric effects
- Bloom, SSAO, anti-aliasing, and post-processing
- Fully customizable settings for your preference
- Smooth performance on modest hardware
- Vanilla-like visibility and gameplay feel

**Perfect for:**
Low-end PC users who want beautiful Minecraft without lag.

**Requirements:**
- Iris Shaders
- Minecraft 1.20+
